title: CC narrative review S13 panel a2

payload.notes: S13 is the 2nd panel of the B08 audit climax (P02_b08, beat "The Inflation Audit"), and its assigned beat is the ROOT-CAUSE REVEAL: the adversarial audit catches the evaluator secretly running a JSON sanitizer that default-fills malformed records (e.g. {"city":"Tok|yo"} sliced across the schema boundary), so the headline +6.2 was a self-repair artifact, not a real model gain. narrative_beat_fidelity 5: this attempt nails the diagnosis — the technical chart decomposes reported +6.2 (INFLATED) − true +1.4 (REAL) = +4.8 gap, and the chart caption 'EVALUATOR INTEGRITY — sanitizer ≠ external validator' makes the mechanism legible in one read; the malformed {"city":"Tok|yo"} record is by-design (the bug being exhibited), not corruption, and reads as the load-bearing diagnostic payload. The beat stays distinct from S12 (apparent +6.2 headline), S14 (invariant upgrade), and S15 (re-run enforcement), so the audit arc remains monotonic. composition_story 5: reading order duo → decomposition chart → 'sanitizer ≠ external validator' caution flows cleanly; the +4.8 gap label and the three numbers stay readable at panel scale. NARRATIVE VERDICT: PASS on beat — root-cause reveal delivered and distinct. Visual identity-lock / baked-text quality / artifact-severity are the visual reviewers' (Gemini + Codex) call.
